message:
refactor(defer,search,id): extract render_defer_output, format search tests, and fix ID hash entropy

- defer.rs: extract render_defer_output() to separate rendering
  from business logic; remove redundant borrow-of-borrow patterns
  in iteration
- search.rs: reformat test code for rustfmt compliance (multi-line
  vec!, let-chain spacing)
- id.rs: take the LAST `length` chars from base36 encoding instead
  of the first, preserving entropy from the least significant
  digits which vary more across sequential inputs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
